+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?\n```\ngem info --local grpc\n\n*** LOCAL GEMS ***\n\ngrpc (1.35.0)\n    Platform: universal-darwin\n    Author: gRPC Authors\n    Homepage: https://github.com/google/grpc/tree/master/src/ruby\n   "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for LoadError with Ruby 3.0 and grpc gem",
+        "description": "Kicked off an artifact run in: https://fusion2.corp.google.com/invocations/0e763400-0be8-47b6-b4ff-12b2434d989e/targets\n```yaml\ngem info --local grpc\n\n*** LOCAL GEMS ***\n\ngrpc (1.35.0)\n    Platform: universal-darwin\n    Author: gRPC Authors\n    Homepage: https://github.com/google/grpc/tree/master/src/ruby\n    License: Apache-2.0\n    Installed at: /Users/<me>/.rbenv/versions/3.0.0/lib/ruby/gems/3.0.0\n\n    GRPC system in Ruby\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm LoadError with Ruby 3.0 and grpc gem is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {

This could take a while...\nSuccessfully installed google-protobuf-3.14.0\nSuccessfully installed googleapis-common-protos-types-1.0.5\nSuccessfully installed grpc-1.35.0-universal-darwin\nParsing documentation for google-protobuf-3.14.0\nInstalling ri documentation for google-protobuf-3.14.0\nParsing documentation for googleapis-common-protos-types-1.0.5\nInstalling ri documentation for googleapis-common-protos-types-1.0.5\nParsing documentation for grpc-1.35."
